title: StcStrand
description: A Save-the-Cat strand — the A story (external plot) or B story (internal/relationship arc that carries theme) per design/save-the-cat-sketch-01.md S3. The kind field is a closed enum at two values matching the Python StrandKind enum. Per save-the-cat-sketch-02 S11, `focal_character_id` optionally names the character the strand is structurally about (often the protagonist for the A story, the love-interest for the B story under Snyder's convention).

id.description: Stable identifier for this strand (e.g., 'Strand_A_scotland', 'Strand_B_marriage'). No prefix convention enforced. PFS7-SR2.

kind.description: Which of the two Save-the-Cat strand kinds this strand occupies. Closed enum per S3 — Save-the-Cat distinguishes exactly two strand kinds; additional kinds would be a dialect amendment. Matches StrandKind enum values in Python. PFS7-SR2.

description.description: Optional author prose describing this strand's through-line. Python default is an empty string; schema admits the empty string and absence interchangeably. PFS7-SR3.

focal_character_id.description: Optional non-empty string naming a StcCharacter id this strand is structurally about. Plain-string reference to a sibling StcCharacter per PFS7-X1 (flat-with-id-refs topology); resolution audit is PFS7 OQ4. Python None → field omitted in dump. PFS7-SR4.

authored_by.description: Optional provenance string. Python default 'author'. PFS7-SR.
